name: Client Operating Model Phase 1 Build Client System Discovery
outcome_goal: Implement the first durable client-system discovery substrate: system census, connector capability evidence, credential-health references, object/API/event surface capture, typed gaps, tests, and a phase report.
anti_requirements: Do not stage or commit git changes.
Do not store raw credentials or client secrets.
Do not mutate live client systems.
Do not turn discovery into hidden script authority.
Do not regenerate shared docs/API.md, docs/CLI.md, or docs/MCP.md in this parallel chain; note docs requirements in the report.

jobs.label: phase_01_client_system_discovery_build
jobs.prompt: Build Phase 1 from artifacts/workflow/client_operating_model/packets/phase_01_client_system_discovery/PLAN.md. First discover existing authority with praxis workflow discover/search and repo inspection. Implement the smallest durable substrate for client system discovery and connector census that fits existing Praxis patterns: typed system census records, connector capability/object/API/event surface evidence, credential-health references with no secrets, automation-bearing tool classification, typed gaps, and deterministic fixture tests. Prefer DB-backed/CQRS-ready contracts over ad hoc scripts; if persistence needs a migration, add the migration file and authority metadata but do not apply a broad schema backlog. Keep docs local to docs/architecture/object-truth-trust-toolbelt and write a phase report at artifacts/workflow/client_operating_model/build_reports/phase_01_IMPLEMENTATION.md with changed files, validation commands, known blockers, and next dependency notes. Do not stage or commit.
